content.claim: The European Commission opened an infringement procedure against Hungary in 2016 for segregation of Romani children in schools, naming segregated church schools as a contributing factor. As of 2024, this procedure remains formally open with no public resolution announced.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: No publicly available detail on the substantive investigation status or expected timeline for closure
The extent to which infringement threat has influenced Hungarian policy is not documented
The Commission's historical application of infringement leverage on this dossier is inconsistent, as detailed in broader EU-Hungary rule-of-law proceedings
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
